holds_belgian_nationality.name: holds_belgian_nationality
holds_belgian_nationality.description: The person holds Belgian nationality (proven by the person).

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

falls_under_community_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
falls_under_community_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.name: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence
satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory. Defined by rules encoding the relevant access and residence conditions.

is_in_illegal_residence.name: is_in_illegal_residence
is_in_illegal_residence.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without satisfying access or residence conditions.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_dublin_determination_procedur.name: subject_to_dublin_determination_procedure
subject_to_dublin_determination_procedur.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the member state responsible for examining the request for international protection.

subject_to_relevant_procedure.name: subject_to_relevant_procedure
subject_to_relevant_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure, international protection procedure, or Dublin determination procedure.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination has been performed for the foreigner.

objective_criterion_established.name: objective_criterion_established
objective_criterion_established.description: At least one objective criterion listed in paragraph 2 is met for the foreigner.

risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding for the foreigner is current and real.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner.

has_valid_travel_document.name: has_valid_travel_document
has_valid_travel_document.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_own_authority.name: recognised_as_national_by_own_authority
recognised_as_national_by_own_authority.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country.

own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_p.name: own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
own_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_p.description: The national authority of the foreigner's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_nationality_category_for_lai.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_laissez_passer
falls_under_nationality_category_for_lai.description: The foreigner falls under a category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The foreigner is an identified foreigner.

absconding_criterion_1_met.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
absconding_criterion_1_met.description: Criterion 1: the foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not submit a request for international protection within the period provided by law.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

no_international_protection_request_with.name: no_international_protection_request_within_period
no_international_protection_request_with.description: The foreigner did not submit a request for international protection within the period provided by law.

absconding_criterion_2_met.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
absconding_criterion_2_met.description: Criterion 2: the foreigner used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

used_false_information_or_documents.name: used_false_information_or_documents
used_false_information_or_documents.description: The foreigner used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means.name: committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means
committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means.description: The foreigner committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

absconding_criterion_3_met.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
absconding_criterion_3_met.description: Criterion 3: the foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the relevant authorities.

absconding_criterion_4_met.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
absconding_criterion_4_met.description: Criterion 4: the foreigner has indicated non-compliance or has already failed to comply with a transfer, removal, entry ban, freedom-restricting, or equivalent measure.

indicated_noncompliance_with_transfer_or.name: indicated_noncompliance_with_transfer_or_removal
indicated_noncompliance_with_transfer_or.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance or already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure.

indicated_noncompliance_with_entry_ban.name: indicated_noncompliance_with_entry_ban
indicated_noncompliance_with_entry_ban.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance or already failed to comply with an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

indicated_noncompliance_with_less_coerci.name: indicated_noncompliance_with_less_coercive_measure
indicated_noncompliance_with_less_coerci.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance or already failed to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

indicated_noncompliance_with_freedom_res.name: indicated_noncompliance_with_freedom_restricting_measure
indicated_noncompliance_with_freedom_res.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance or already failed to comply with a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

indicated_noncompliance_with_equivalent_.name: indicated_noncompliance_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
indicated_noncompliance_with_equivalent_.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance or already failed to comply with a measure taken by another member state equivalent to criterion 4 measures.

absconding_criterion_5_met.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
absconding_criterion_5_met.description: Criterion 5: the foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

subject_to_active_entry_ban.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
subject_to_active_entry_ban.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom or in another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

absconding_criterion_6_met.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
absconding_criterion_6_met.description: Criterion 6: the foreigner submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a negative decision or removal measure.

submitted_new_application_immediately_af.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_immediately_af.description: The foreigner submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, ending residence, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

absconding_criterion_7_met.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
absconding_criterion_7_met.description: Criterion 7: the foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound state after submitting an international protection request.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.description: The foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound state after submitting an international protection request.

absconding_criterion_8_met.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
absconding_criterion_8_met.description: Criterion 8: the foreigner submitted multiple international protection requests or residence applications in the Kingdom or other member states resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The foreigner has submitted multiple requests for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other member states that resulted in negative decisions or did not lead to a residence permit.

absconding_criterion_9_met.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
absconding_criterion_9_met.description: Criterion 9: the foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another Dublin-bound state.

concealed_prior_protection_request_in_du.name: concealed_prior_protection_request_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_protection_request_in_du.description: The foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had previously submitted a request for international protection in another Dublin-bound state.

absconding_criterion_10_met.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
absconding_criterion_10_met.description: Criterion 10: the foreigner declared or it appears from the file that the foreigner came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which the protection request or residence application was submitted.

came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_appl.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_appl.description: The foreigner declared or it appears from the file that the foreigner came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which the protection request or residence application was submitted.

absconding_criterion_11_met.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
absconding_criterion_11_met.description: Criterion 11: the foreigner is subject to a fine because the foreigner submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The foreigner is subject to a fine because the foreigner submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

reasons_to_assume_will_abscond.name: reasons_to_assume_will_abscond
reasons_to_assume_will_abscond.description: Reasons exist to assume that the foreigner will abscond.
